assessment.note: Request to adjust work hours indicates a need for flexibility, providing clarity on managing personal and work commitments.

new_queue.label: Feedback received
new_queue.name: What feedback have you received recently that’s stuck with you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces any impactful feedback that might be affecting current mood or performance.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What area of your role are you looking to grow or stretch in next?
new_queue.description: Pinpoints areas where the individual feels they can stretch and grow, revealing engagement and growth opportunities.

new_queue.label: Work-life balance
new_queue.name: What would help you balance work and home responsibilities better right now?
new_queue.description: Explores potential adjustments to improve work-life balance, addressing wellbeing and clarity.
